element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Extended dialogue with multiple character encounters

element_introduction_order.element: Max as usable tool (Max's head inventory icon)

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Progressive location unlocking as investigation advances
Mix of mandatory plot minigames and optional challenges

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Post-carnival (World's Largest Ball of Twine onwards)

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Dialogue-driven investigation pacing with episodic location-based structure. Low physical tension (characters cannot die), high cognitive tension from puzzle-solving. Humor provides frequent relief beats.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Minigames labeled as optional (e.g., Battleship variant); non-critical NPC conversations; exploration of secondary carnival/location areas

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-implicit through carnival exploration; simple item collection and basic NPC interaction; low puzzle complexity
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive location travel expanding map; intermediate item combinations; mandatory minigame challenges; multi-NPC investigation requiring information synthesis
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex puzzle chains; advanced item combination logic; investigation convergence requiring synthesis of clues from multiple locations
notable_spikes: First mandatory minigame (rat-based Whac-A-Mole variant) blocking progress
Multi-location investigation requiring travel and re-questioning NPCs
Final puzzle chains requiring multiple inventory items and location knowledge

notable_level_patterns.description: Safe, bounded introduction area. Multiple NPCs provide initial exposition and puzzle items. Establishes dialogue and inventory mechanics. Low stakes, high guidance implicit through character dialogue.

Self-contained location with specific environmental puzzle theme (e.g., Ball of Twine, Magnetic Vortex, Mount Rushmore). Puzzle solution yields inventory item or information advancing main investigation. Optional exploration of secondary content.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: World's Largest Ball of Twine; Vortex site; Mount Rushmore

notable_level_patterns.description: As game progresses, map reveals new locations. Player must backtrack to earlier locations with new items/information to unlock next progression gate. Encourages inventory management and multi-location synthesis.
Puzzle progression blocked until minigame objective completed. Introduces mechanical challenge distinct from puzzle-solving (action/reaction rather than logical deduction).
